name: law firms managing 5–15 contracts/month tool
description: For law firms processing 5–15 contracts/month, missed contract renewals cause legal penalties. We provide automated renewal alerts instead of manual tracking of contract dates in spreadsheets.

locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For law firms processing 5–15 contracts/month, missed contract renewals cause legal penalties. We provide automated renewal alerts instead of manual tracking of contract dates in spreadsheets.
locked_fields.current_alternative: manual tracking of contract dates in spreadsheets
